name: competitive-pricing-research

related_skills.name: web-research
related_skills.why: general fallback for extracting facts and sources when live pages don't render cleanly

citations: friction: could not save chrome-extension screenshots to the sandbox filesystem, so the core 'save screenshots to folder' deliverable was not met
friction: target real-estate sites rendered pricing tables as images/canvas/video, defeating clean capture
friction: heavy pages required repeated waits/scrolls and retried capture attempts
pattern: fell back to WebSearch + HTML extraction when live pages loaded poorly
pattern: delivered the requested comparison with concrete price figures and sources
pattern: transparently disclosed the screenshot limitation to the user
